summary: Auth bug-fix regression tests (iteration 4). All 15/15 tests passed covering: admin login, wrong-password 401, invalid/expired token 401 (not 500), regular user register→login→me flow, webhook regression, and AI sentiment regression.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.tsx: updateServerUrl() still writes to AsyncStorage SERVER_URL_KEY but loadToken() immediately clears it on next startup — low risk but the write is dead code. Consider removing or deprecating updateServerUrl().

api.ts: apiFetch() does not propagate 401 back to AuthContext to clear the token (it only throws Error). This is acceptable since loadToken() handles the wipe on next startup, but a real-time logout on 401 response would be cleaner.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_authbug_* user created during regular user flow tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth bug fix fully verified: (1) admin login returns {token, user} with is_admin=true, (2) wrong credentials → 401 with detail message, (3) GET /auth/me with invalid/expired/missing token → 401 (never 500), (4) new user register+login works, (5) webhook and AI sentiment endpoints unaffected by auth changes. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_bugfix.py

TestGetMe.test_valid_token_returns_200_with_user: PASS — 200, user object correct, no _id leak
